summary: The diff implements a substantial portion of the build request — backend Motoko actor, frontend screens, animations, RPG styling, and asset integration. However, several specific requirements have gaps or are only partially fulfilled based on the visible diff evidence.

missing_requirements.requirement: Lesson content includes drag-and-drop question type as one of the interactive question types
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows only 'multiple-choice' and 'fill-blank' question types in gameData.ts and LessonPage references. Drag-and-drop is listed as a required question type in REQ-2 but is not present in any visible file.

missing_requirements.requirement: Boss lessons must award 3x the base XP flagged with isBoss: true
missing_requirements.reason: The Lesson type has isBossBattle field, but the backend/main.mo is truncated and no evidence of boss lessons being seeded with 3x XP is visible in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Skill tree for Math has at least 15 nodes and English has at least 15 nodes seeded in backend
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo is truncated and no skill tree seeding data with 15+ nodes per subject is visible in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: claimStreakReward can only be called once per milestone
missing_requirements.reason: Backend implementation is truncated and milestone claim deduplication logic is not visible in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Session includes 10 randomly selected questions from the chosen subject for multiplayer
missing_requirements.reason: The backend is truncated and no multiplayer session question-selection logic is visible in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Leaderboard shows top 10 users by XP with rank badges
missing_requirements.reason: LeaderboardPage.tsx is listed as a route in App.tsx but its implementation is not present in the visible diff due to file limits. Cannot confirm rank badges and top-10 XP display.

missing_requirements.requirement: Purchased avatar costumes appear in the Profile screen avatar customization panel
missing_requirements.reason: ShopPage and ProfilePage are referenced in App.tsx but their implementations are omitted from the visible diff. Cannot confirm avatar customization panel integration.

missing_requirements.requirement: World Map renders with layered parallax-style illustration zones and the world map background asset as the background
missing_requirements.reason: WorldMapPage.tsx is listed in routing but its implementation is not present in the visible diff. Cannot confirm parallax layering or background asset usage.

missing_requirements.requirement: All 9 required image assets served from frontend/public/assets/generated including world-map-bg, 4 avatars, icon-coin, icon-gem, icon-streak, boss-banner
missing_requirements.reason: icon-streak.dim_64x64.png and world-map-bg.dim_1200x800.png are not referenced in any visible file, and no evidence of the actual generated asset files being added is present in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Daily Quests panel shows progress bars for each active quest with actual incremental progress
missing_requirements.reason: DailyQuestsPage.tsx explicitly comments the progress bar is 'visual only, always 0 or 100', meaning true incremental quest progress tracking is not implemented.

hallucinated_features.description: LoginPage screen and /login route added as a separate authentication screen
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify a dedicated login page or route beyond Internet Identity authentication with onboarding. A separate LoginPage component and route is implemented beyond what was requested.

hallucinated_features.description: MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules included in the backend actor
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies a single Motoko actor with no mention of authorization mixins or access control modules. These appear to be scaffolding additions beyond the requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: MixinStorage and blob storage included in the backend actor
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies all state in stable Motoko variables with no external databases. Blob storage mixin was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: UserProfile type and getCallerUserProfile/saveCallerUserProfile caller-based functions added to backend
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-1 does not specify a UserProfile entity separate from User, nor caller-principal-based profile functions. These appear to be additional scaffolding not in the requirements.
